spec.description: Currently authenticated user sessions across all instances. Stale sessions expire by Better Auth TTL.
spec.title: Active Users

spec.description: Live registry size from chat-ws (ObservableGauge, scraped each export interval).
spec.title: WS Connections

spec.description: 5-minute average inbound HTTP request rate. /health (Railway probe) is excluded at the @hono/otel middleware level so this reflects real user traffic.
spec.title: Req/s (5m)

spec.description: 5xx responses ÷ all responses over the last 5m. Spikes correlate with deploys, upstream outages, or DB problems. >1% warns, >5% pages.
spec.title: 5xx Rate %

spec.description: 5-minute average LLM gateway request rate (chat + tts).
spec.title: LLM Req/s (5m)

spec.description: Email failures ÷ total attempts over the last 5m. >5% means Resend / DNS / suppression-list problems blocking auth flows.
spec.title: Email Failure %

spec.description: Share of inbound HTTP requests by method. Skew toward POST often signals a misbehaving client; surprise PUT/DELETE may indicate stale clients.
spec.title: HTTP Methods (last 5m)

spec.description: Share of LLM gateway calls by model. Quickly shows which model is doing the heavy lifting.
spec.title: LLM Models (last 5m)

spec.description: Distribution of response codes. A healthy server is ~95%+ 2xx — yellow/red slices stand out instantly.
spec.title: HTTP Status Codes (last 5m)

spec.description: Inbound rate split by HTTP method, showing the time evolution of the donut in row 2.
spec.title: HTTP Request Rate by Method

spec.description: Per-model request rate. Useful for capacity planning and spotting model-routing regressions.
spec.title: LLM Request Rate by Model

spec.description: WebSocket message throughput in both directions. Sent = server → client; received = client → server.
spec.title: WS Messages I/O

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, http_route) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_request_method!="OPTIONS", http_route!~"/api/v1/openai/.*", http_response_status_code!="404"}[$__rate_interval])))

spec.description: P95 latency per Hono-matched route, excluding /api/v1/openai/* (LLM gateway latency lives in row 4 right). Routes are the route patterns @hono/otel sees AFTER Hono matches — concrete URLs collapse cleanly into one series per route.
spec.title: HTTP P95 by Route

spec.description: Time from request start to first streamed token. Tracks streaming chat experience independently from total operation duration.
spec.title: LLM TTFB P95 by Model

spec.description: Stacked error response rates. 4xx surfaces client-side issues (validation, auth); 5xx is server-side. 200/3xx are intentionally excluded so a small absolute number isn't hidden behind a wall of green.
spec.title: 4xx / 5xx Rate

spec.description: LLM streams that died mid-flight over the dashboard time range. before_first_chunk = upstream blew up; mid_stream = partial delivery (user saw a broken response).
spec.title: Stream Interruptions (range)

spec.description: Requests blocked by the in-memory rate limiter, by route + key type. Sustained activity here is either an attack or a misconfigured client.
spec.title: Rate-Limit Blocks

spec.description: Stripe revenue over dashboard time range, in major currency unit (cents → dollars). Cross-currency sums are meaningless — always grouped by currency. Empty in dev / fresh deploys.
spec.title: Revenue (range)

spec.description: Completed checkouts ÷ created checkouts over dashboard time range. Drops can flag price-page bugs or payment-method outages.
spec.title: Checkout Conversion %

spec.description: Webhook events grouped by event.type. Pattern shifts (e.g. surge in invoice.payment_failed) indicate billing health.
spec.title: Stripe Events (range)

spec.description: PostgreSQL query duration P95 from PgInstrumentation. Spikes correlate with index misses, connection exhaustion, or backend lock contention.
spec.title: DB Query P95 (5m)

spec.description: Open PostgreSQL connections across all instances. Compare to env DB_POOL_MAX × instance count.
spec.title: DB Pool Connections

spec.description: V8 heap used ÷ heap limit. Sustained >85% = consider raising memory or hunting a leak.
spec.title: Heap Used %

spec.description: P99 event-loop delay. >50ms means CPU-bound work (sync JSON parsing, CPU-heavy regex) is blocking the loop.
spec.title: Event Loop Delay P99

spec.description: Live application logs from Loki. Filter via the panel UI; click trace_id field to jump to Tempo.
spec.title: Application Logs
